scripts.test:functional: npm run build && k6 run dist/functional/trade-api.js --summary-export=logs/functional-log.json
scripts.test:load: npm run build && k6 run dist/performance/load-test.js --summary-export=logs/load-log.json
scripts.test:stress: npm run build && k6 run dist/performance/stress-test.js --summary-export=logs/stress-log.json
scripts.test:spike: npm run build && k6 run dist/performance/spike-test.js --summary-export=logs/spike-log.json
scripts.test:concurrency: npm run build && k6 run dist/performance/concurrency-test.js --summary-export=logs/concurrency-log.json
scripts.test:perf:all: npm run test:load && npm run test:stress && npm run test:spike && npm run test:concurrency
scripts.test:all: npm run test:functional && npm run test:perf:all
